tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: How Can You Mend A Broken Heart

content:
Key: G#

[Intro]
[ch]C#maj7[/ch]  [ch]C#/Eb[/ch]  [ch]G#maj7[/ch]  [ch]G#[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]       [ch]G#[/ch]                 [ch]C#sus4[/ch]
Saying goodbye is never an easy thing[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bbm7[/ch]            [ch]G#[/ch]
But you never said, you stay forever[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G#[/ch]               [ch]C#sus4[/ch]
So if you must go darling, I'll set you free[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bbm7[/ch] [ch]Gm7b5[/ch]       [ch]Fm7[/ch]     [ch]D#[/ch]
But I know in time, we'll be together[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#[/ch]             [ch]G#/C[/ch]
I won't try to stop you now from leaving[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C#[/ch]             [ch]F7[/ch]
'Cause in my heart, I know[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                   [ch]C#maj7[/ch]               [ch]C#/Eb[/ch]
Love will lead you back, someday I just know that[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G#maj7[/ch]                  [ch]F7[/ch]     [ch]Adim7[/ch]
Love will lead you back to my arms, where you belong[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C#maj7[/ch]                  [ch]C#/Eb[/ch]
I'm sure, sure as stars are shining[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]G#maj7[/ch]            [ch]F7[/ch]
One day you will find me again, it won't be long[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C#[/ch]       [ch]D#[/ch]                 [ch]G#[/ch]     [ch]G#maj7[/ch]
One of these days our love will lead you back[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]              [ch]G#[/ch]                [ch]C#sus4[/ch]
One of these nights, I'll hear your voice again[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bbm7[/ch]              [ch]G#[/ch]
You're gonna say, how much you miss me[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]G#[/ch]                      [ch]C#sus4[/ch]
You walked out this door but someday you'll walk back in[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bbm7[/ch] [ch]Gm7b5[/ch]          [ch]Fm7[/ch]     [ch]D#[/ch]
Darling I know, I know this will be[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#[/ch]                  [ch]G#/C[/ch]
Sometimes it takes, sometime out on your own now[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#[/ch]                    [ch]F7[/ch]
To find your way back home[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                   [ch]C#maj7[/ch]               [ch]C#/Eb[/ch]
Love will lead you back, someday I just know that[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G#maj7[/ch]                  [ch]F7[/ch]     [ch]Adim7[/ch]
Love will lead you back to my arms, where you belong[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C#maj7[/ch]                  [ch]C#/Eb[/ch]
I'm sure, sure as stars are shining[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]G#maj7[/ch]            [ch]F7[/ch]
One day you will find me again, it won't be long[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C#[/ch]       [ch]D#[/ch]                  [ch]G#[/ch]     [ch]G#maj7[/ch]
One of these days our love will lead you back[/tab]

[Guitar Solo]
[ch]F#maj7[/ch]  [ch]Bsus4[/ch]  [ch]F#maj7[/ch]  [ch]Bsus4[/ch] 
[ch]F#[/ch]      [ch]C#/F[/ch]   [ch]D#m7[/ch]    [ch]C#[/ch]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Bsus4[/ch]            [ch]F#/Bb[/ch]
I won't try to stop you now from leaving[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bsus4[/ch]                [ch]Eb7sus2[/ch]    [ch]G#[/ch]  [ch]F#dim7[/ch]  [ch]Fm7[/ch]  [ch]D#m7[/ch] 
'Cause in my heart I know[/tab]

[Chorus] (x2)
[tab]                   [ch]C#maj7[/ch]               [ch]C#/Eb[/ch]
Love will lead you back, someday I just know that[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G#maj7[/ch]                  [ch]F7[/ch]      [ch]Adim7[/ch]
Love will lead you back to my arms, where you belong[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C#maj7[/ch]                  [ch]C#/Eb[/ch]
I'm sure, sure as stars are shining[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]G#maj7[/ch]            [ch]F7[/ch]
One day you will find me again, it won't be long[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C#[/ch]       [ch]D#[/ch]                 [ch]G#[/ch]       [ch]F7[/ch] 
One of these days our love will lead you back[/tab]

[Outro]
[ch]G#[/ch]  [ch]G#maj7[/ch]
